title: Asthma and Respiratory Drug Therapy in the Caribbean
description: This 4-week course covers the management of asthma and respiratory conditions prevalent across the Caribbean, including Jamaica, Trinidad & Tobago, Barbados, Guyana, and Belize. It equips pharmacy technicians to provide effective drug therapy and education for patients in high-demand, resource-constrained clinical settings.
what_youll_learn: Classify common respiratory diseases and their epidemiology in the Caribbean region
Describe the mechanism of action, indications, and side effects of key asthma and COPD medications
Evaluate the role of pharmacy technicians in chronic respiratory disease management
Identify potential drug interactions with traditional Caribbean herbal remedies
Apply best practices for procurement, storage, and distribution of respiratory medications
